mapper.insert: INSERT INTO parent_profile (user_id, name_enc, relationship, assigned_teacher_id, child_name_enc, child_disorder_type, class_id, child_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{nameEnc}, #{relationship}, #{assignedTeacherId}, #{childNameEnc}, #{childDisorderType}, #{classId}, #{childId})
mapper.update: UPDATE parent_profile SET child_id = #{childId} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT p.user_id, u.username, u.status, p.name_enc, p.relationship, p.assigned_teacher_id, p.child_name_enc, p.child_disorder_type, p.class_id, c.name AS class_name, p.child_id FROM parent_profile p JOIN app_user u ON u.id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN class_room c ON c.id = p.class_id WHERE u.org_id = #{orgId} AND u.role = 'PARENT' ORDER BY p.user_id

SELECT p.user_id, u.username, u.status, p.name_enc, p.relationship, p.assigned_teacher_id, p.child_name_enc, p.child_disorder_type, p.class_id, c.name AS class_name, p.child_id FROM parent_profile p JOIN app_user u ON u.id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN class_room c ON c.id = p.class_id WHERE p.assigned_teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND u.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY p.user_id
